title: Create: Unbreakable Netherite Shears
description: This mod basically adds a new Unbreakable Netherite variant of the minecraft shears, that is as the name says unbreakable!
body:
![Icon of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5f25c37f6d620acb4e17961083e4f049349882c.png)
# Create: Unbreakable Netherite Shears
The **Unbreakable Netherite Shears** is literally exactly what it says. These are shears made from **gold** and some **netherite** and they are entirely **unbreakable**! They are for late game

![The actual recipe for it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa496ceacb36994ef8853e4173240b1fae6c10c3.png)

**Curseforge version:** [Link (Click me)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-unbreakable-netherite-shears)
